blocked_reason: Self-paced setup requires a pre-existing Azure resource group + Foundry project, but docs don't tell the learner how to provision one. Run paused to redesign setup flow.

notes.outcome: Prereqs OK: az 2.86.0, azd 1.25.2, Docker 29.5.0, Python 3.12.13. Logged into <your-subscription> as <your-account>.
